definition:
1. to shake  or brandish  a weapon or shield, (Iliad by Homer), etc. 
2. generally, to shake , τ. γαῖαν, of Poseidon, (Iliad by Homer); θρόνον ἐτίναξε upset  the seat, (Odyssey by Homer): of wind, to scatter , (Odyssey by Homer):—;Mid., τιναξάσθην πτερά they shook their  wings, (Odyssey by Homer):—;Pass., ἐτινάσσετο Ὄλυμπος shook  or quaked , (Hesiod) (ML)
